summary: Iteration 114: Testing Admin Temp Password Feature and P0 Honorary Licensee Data Consistency Bug Fix. Backend: 10/10 tests PASSED. Frontend: P0 bug fix CONFIRMED - Rizza's dashboard shows $6,530.00 (dynamic), not stale $5,000. ISSUE FOUND: Force change password dialog not appearing (redirect happens before dialog shows).

ui_bugs.issue: Force change password dialog does NOT appear for users with must_change_password=true. The redirect to /dashboard happens immediately after login (within 200ms) before the dialog can render.
ui_bugs.root_cause: In LoginPage.jsx line 74-76, the Navigate redirect checks `isAuthenticated && !loading` and redirects to dashboard. This happens on component re-render after setUser() is called in AuthContext.login(), which makes isAuthenticated true BEFORE setShowForceChangePassword(true) can render the dialog.

action_items: FIX (HIGH): In LoginPage.jsx, modify the redirect logic to NOT redirect if showForceChangePassword is true. Change line 74-76 to: `if (isAuthenticated && !loading && !showForceChangePassword) { return <Navigate to='/dashboard' replace />; }`
ALTERNATIVE FIX: In AuthContext.jsx login(), don't set user/token if must_change_password is true - only set after password change completes
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend /api/auth/login correctly returns must_change_password flag (line 962-964 in server.py)
✅ Backend /api/profit/summary uses get_user_financial_summary which calls calculate_honorary_licensee_value for honorary licensees
✅ AuthContext.jsx login() correctly extracts and returns must_change_password from response
⚠️ LoginPage.jsx redirect logic doesn't account for showForceChangePassword state

success_rate.frontend: P0 bug fix verified, force change password dialog NOT working

seed_data_creation: Rizza's temp password was reset to 'rizzatemp123' with must_change_password=true at end of test for future testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 honorary licensee data consistency bug is FIXED - direct login shows same dynamic account value ($6,530) as admin simulation. Force change password dialog has a bug where redirect happens before dialog can render - needs frontend fix. Test data has Rizza with temp password 'rizzatemp123' and must_change_password=true.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Force Change Password Dialog Not Appearing
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Race condition between state update (setShowForceChangePassword) and component redirect. The Navigate component in LoginPage.jsx (line 74-76) evaluates `isAuthenticated && !loading` which becomes true when AuthContext.login() calls setUser(). This triggers a re-render and immediate redirect to /dashboard before the dialog state can be rendered.
reproduction_steps: 1. Admin sets temp password for user via /api/admin/members/{user_id}/set-temp-password
2. User logs in with temp password
4. AuthContext.login() sets token, user (making isAuthenticated=true), returns must_change_password=true
5. LoginPage.handleSubmit() receives must_change_password=true and calls setShowForceChangePassword(true)
6. Component re-renders, but Navigate evaluates BEFORE dialog renders
7. User is redirected to /dashboard within 200ms, dialog never shown
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Add showForceChangePassword to the redirect condition: `if (isAuthenticated && !loading && !showForceChangePassword)`

p0_bug_fix_verification.before_fix: Direct login showed stale $5,000 (from license.current_amount), admin simulation showed dynamic $6,530
p0_bug_fix_verification.after_fix: Both direct login AND admin simulation show dynamic $6,530 calculated from master admin trades
endpoints_verified: /api/profit/summary - returns dynamic account_value for honorary licensees
